news.title:
Avenue Supermarts rose 3.2% on 18 Mar 2026, hitting Rs 3,902.9 intraday.
The stock outperformed Sensex's 0.8% and retail sector's 2.8% gains.
news.summary:
Avenue Supermarts rose 3.2% on 18 Mar 2026, hitting Rs 3,902.9 intraday.
The stock outperformed Sensex's 0.8% and retail sector's 2.8% gains.

news.title:
Avenue Supermarts appoints Kalpana Unadkat as chairperson effective April 1, 2026, succeeding Chandrashekhar Bhave.
Unadkat's expertise in corporate governance and cross-border M&A aligns with DMart's growth and competitive focus.
news.summary:
Avenue Supermarts appoints Kalpana Unadkat as chairperson effective April 1, 2026, succeeding Chandrashekhar Bhave.
Unadkat's expertise in corporate governance and cross-border M&A aligns with DMart's growth and competitive focus.

news.title:
Avenue Supermarts appoints Anshul Asawa as MD & CEO, Ramakant Baheti as CFO.
Ashu Gupta named Compliance Officer, event materiality effective April 2026.
news.summary:
Avenue Supermarts appoints Anshul Asawa as MD & CEO, Ramakant Baheti as CFO.
Ashu Gupta named Compliance Officer, event materiality effective April 2026.

news.title:
Avenue Supermarts gains 4.74% over 3 sessions after launching 9 DMart stores.
Q3 FY26 net profit surged 18.3% to Rs 855.9 cr; revenue rose 13.3% YoY to Rs 18,100.9 cr.
news.summary:
Avenue Supermarts gains 4.74% over 3 sessions after launching 9 DMart stores.
Q3 FY26 net profit surged 18.3% to Rs 855.9 cr; revenue rose 13.3% YoY to Rs 18,100.9 cr.

news.title:
Avenue Supermarts opened 8 new stores across 8 cities, raising total count to 461.
Expansion spans Gujarat, Goa, Punjab, Telangana, Karnataka, Haryana, MP, Uttarakhand.
news.summary:
Avenue Supermarts opened 8 new stores across 8 cities, raising total count to 461.
Expansion spans Gujarat, Goa, Punjab, Telangana, Karnataka, Haryana, MP, Uttarakhand.

news.title: HSBC downgrades Avenue Supermarts, setting target price at Rs 3500.
news.summary: HSBC downgrades Avenue Supermarts, setting target price at Rs 3500.

news.title:
Avenue Supermarts opened 3 new stores on Feb 23, 2026, in Kota, Ghaziabad, and Greater Noida.
The total store count for Avenue Supermarts has now risen to 452.
news.summary:
Avenue Supermarts opened 3 new stores on Feb 23, 2026, in Kota, Ghaziabad, and Greater Noida.
The total store count for Avenue Supermarts has now risen to 452.

news.title:
Avenue Supermarts (DMart) shows strong growth in ROCE, now at 16%, well above the Consumer Retailing industry average of 10%.
The company has increased capital employed by 108% in five years, indicating internal reinvestment opportunities for potential long-term returns.
news.summary:
Avenue Supermarts (DMart) shows strong growth in ROCE, now at 16%, well above the Consumer Retailing industry average of 10%.
The company has increased capital employed by 108% in five years, indicating internal reinvestment opportunities for potential long-term returns.

news.title:
Reliance Retail and DMart reported weakest growth in Q3 due to muted consumer demand despite GST cuts.
Reliance's Ebitda margins fell 50 bps; DMart's SSG grew 5.6%, its slowest in five quarters.
news.summary:
Reliance Retail and DMart reported weakest growth in Q3 due to muted consumer demand despite GST cuts.
Reliance's Ebitda margins fell 50 bps; DMart's SSG grew 5.6%, its slowest in five quarters.

news.title:
Nifty opens below 25,700; Sensex falls 150 points.
Avenue Supermarts is a key focus in market movements.
news.summary:
Nifty opens below 25,700; Sensex falls 150 points.
Avenue Supermarts is a key focus in market movements.

news.title:
DMART Q3 results show margin improvement but slower growth.
Brokerages remain cautious despite the positive margin boost.
news.summary:
DMART Q3 results show margin improvement but slower growth.
Brokerages remain cautious despite the positive margin boost.

news.title:
Systematix assigns 'Hold' rating to DMart on better-than-expected Q3 margins.
Q3 gross margin rose 50 bps to 14.6%, EBITDA margin expanded 47 bps to 8.4%.
news.summary:
Systematix assigns 'Hold' rating to DMart on better-than-expected Q3 margins.
Q3 gross margin rose 50 bps to 14.6%, EBITDA margin expanded 47 bps to 8.4%.

news.title: Citi gives a Sell call on Avenue Supermarts with a target price of Rs 3,150.
news.summary: Citi gives a Sell call on Avenue Supermarts with a target price of Rs 3,150.

news.title:
Jefferies holds Avenue Supermarts at a target price of 4050; steady store additions.
CEO transition in March; minimal impact from labour codes but disclosure concerns linger.
news.summary:
Jefferies holds Avenue Supermarts at a target price of 4050; steady store additions.
CEO transition in March; minimal impact from labour codes but disclosure concerns linger.

news.title: DMart undergoes leadership change, raising questions on future direction.
news.summary: DMart undergoes leadership change, raising questions on future direction.

news.title:
NTPC finalizes STPL acquisition for ₹3,800 crore; ITC secures ₹326.5 crore land in New Delhi for expansion.
Vedanta's NCLT-approved restructuring, M&M's 27% sales growth; Avenue Supermarts posts 17% profit rise in Q3.
news.summary:
NTPC finalizes STPL acquisition for ₹3,800 crore; ITC secures ₹326.5 crore land in New Delhi for expansion.
Vedanta's NCLT-approved restructuring, M&M's 27% sales growth; Avenue Supermarts posts 17% profit rise in Q3.

news.title:
FMCG players report strong Q3 recovery with volume growth, mid-single-digit revenue rise, and margin expansion.
Recovery follows GST reforms, festive demand, and raw material price softening, per updates from major listed firms.
news.summary:
FMCG players report strong Q3 recovery with volume growth, mid-single-digit revenue rise, and margin expansion.
Recovery follows GST reforms, festive demand, and raw material price softening, per updates from major listed firms.

news.title:
DMart CEO Ignatius Noronha to step down on Jan 31, 2026; Anshul Asawa to succeed.
DMart Q3 net profit rose 17% YoY to ₹856 crore; shares closed at ₹3,807, up 0.45%.
news.summary:
DMart CEO Ignatius Noronha to step down on Jan 31, 2026; Anshul Asawa to succeed.
DMart Q3 net profit rose 17% YoY to ₹856 crore; shares closed at ₹3,807, up 0.45%.

news.title:
Avenue Supermarts Ltd reported Q3FY26 standalone revenue of ₹17,642.9 Cr and consolidated revenue of ₹18,117.8 Cr, showcasing strong performance.
Board approved Mr. Anshul Asawa's appointment as CEO from Feb 2026 and Managing Director for three years from April 2026.
news.summary:
Avenue Supermarts Ltd reported Q3FY26 standalone revenue of ₹17,642.9 Cr and consolidated revenue of ₹18,117.8 Cr, showcasing strong performance.
Board approved Mr. Anshul Asawa's appointment as CEO from Feb 2026 and Managing Director for three years from April 2026.

news.title:
CLSA cut DMart's target price to Rs 6,105, implying a 63% upside over Rs 3,745.10.
DMart's low-cost model and private label growth drive market share; Q3 revenue rose 13% YoY to Rs 17,613 crore.
news.summary:
CLSA cut DMart's target price to Rs 6,105, implying a 63% upside over Rs 3,745.10.
DMart's low-cost model and private label growth drive market share; Q3 revenue rose 13% YoY to Rs 17,613 crore.
